query:
-- Step 1: Flip single-cell letter+number (e.g. "A2", "B6", "E3") → number+letter (e.g. "2A", "6B", "3E")
-- Matches exactly: one letter A-E followed by 1-2 digits, nothing else
UPDATE qc_scan_sessions
SET stagingLane = CONCAT(
  REGEXP_SUBSTR(stagingLane, '[0-9]+'),
  REGEXP_SUBSTR(stagingLane, '^[A-E]')
)
WHERE stagingLane REGEXP '^[A-E][0-9]{1,2}$';
command:

-- Matches exactly: one letter A-E followed by 1-2 digits, nothing else
UPDATE qc_scan_sessions
SET stagingLane = CONCAT(
  REGEXP_SUBSTR(stagingLane, '[0-9]+'),
  REGEXP_SUBSTR(stagingLane, '^[A-E]')
)
WHERE stagingLane REGEXP '^[A-E][0-9]{1,2}$';
